name: market_intelligence
description: The ultimate crypto intelligence suite. Provides a high-fidelity, comprehensive report combining real-time token analysis, smart money tracking, on-chain due diligence, ecosystem insights, and actionable signals. Includes technical, fundamental, and sentiment scores in a structured 1000+ word report. Ideal for traders, founders, and large-scale investors.

topic.description: Token ticker, address, or narrative to research in-depth (e.g. 'Base Ecosystem', '$BTC', 'LRT Narratives').

custom_questions.description: Optional specific questions or areas of interest to focus the report on.
